__deprecated__: This JSON analysis job is deprecated. Use the schema-declared equivalent at cartography.models.computed_relationships.gcp_compute_instance_vpc.GCP_INSTANCE_VPC_ANALYSIS
name: GCP Instance to VPC derived relationship analysis

statements.__comment__: Create MEMBER_OF_GCP_VPC relationship by traversing Instance -> NIC -> Subnet -> VPC
statements.query: MATCH (i:GCPInstance)-[:NETWORK_INTERFACE]->(nic:GCPNetworkInterface)-[:PART_OF_SUBNET]->(sn:GCPSubnet)<-[:HAS]-(vpc:GCPVpc) MERGE (i)-[m:MEMBER_OF_GCP_VPC]->(vpc) ON CREATE SET m.firstseen = timestamp() SET m.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG
MATCH (i:GCPInstance)-[r:MEMBER_OF_GCP_VPC]->(vpc:GCPVpc) WHERE r.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH r LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE r RETURN COUNT(*) as TotalCompleted
